form.formComment: Didn't do much last start, 5th (Fr2) over 1650m after showing early speed at Bendigo beaten 21 m by Pastor Dunbar (2:01.70) in 0-1 WIN on April 1 at $71. Before that was driven from back in the field when 5th (Fr4) over 2180m at Terang, beaten 35 m by Coltrane (2:46.40) in 0-1 WIN on March 27 at $41. Facing a tough assignment.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Didn't do much last start, 5th (Fr2) over 1650m after showing early speed at Bendigo beaten 21 m by Pastor Dunbar (2:01.70) in 0-1 WIN on April 1 at $71. previousStarts.stewardsComment: Gave ground and tired over the concluding stages of the race to be beaten 76m.

form.formComment: Two back was well beaten into seventh behind Kamaran at Ararat over 2570m in a No NR on March 23 at $4. Then a handy effort when beaten by 5 m finishing second behind Coltrane at Terang over 2180m in a 0-1 WIN on March 27 at $2.50. Fitter and draws well so could go one better.

Then a handy effort when beaten by 5 m finishing second behind Coltrane at Terang over 2180m in a 0-1 WIN on March 27 at $2.50. Fitter and draws well so could go one better.

form.formComment: Last start took no part at Melton (NR up to 49) on March 20 over 2240m. At the start before 7th (Fr4) over 1609m after showing early speed at Charlton, at the bell was leading 18.2 beaten 55 m by Aetos Dynamis (1:57.30) in 0-1 WIN on February 16 at $31. Can improve sharply.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Galloped heading into the first turn. Trailed the field thereafter.
Broke gait free of interference approaching the 400m.
Broke approaching the home turn on the final occasion.

form.formComment: Didn't do much last time out, 6th (Fr2) over 2190m at Maryborough was 4th-9.1 at the bell, beaten 17 m by Piesridingshotgun (2:45.40) in NR 48 to 52 on March 30 at $81. Before that 9th (Sr2) over 2200m at this track beaten 40 m by Mielicki (2:47.40) in NR 46 to 51 on March 19 at $41. Building in fitness so may show more.

form.formComment: Last start 4th (Fr2) over 2080m at Cranbourne, at the bell was 6th-16.4 beaten 6 m by Against The Bridle (2:40.70) in NR up to 50 on March 29 at $6. Two runs back won by 1.75 m when driven back in the field, (Fr7) held up early, at Melton (2:08.60) beating Jessicas Story in NR up to 42 on March 20 at $3.30 at the bell was 2nd-4.28. Contender.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Out of position when start was effected.
Galloped clear of interference near the 100m.
Raced roughly shortly after the start was effected.

form.formComment: Last start 9th (Fr4) over 1690m after being wide early at Maryborough beaten 60 m by Blackrange Glory (2:05.40) in NR 45 to 50 on March 16 at $4. At the start before 9th (Fr5) over 2150m after showing early speed at Bendigo, beaten 45 m by Deep Love (2:41.30) in NR 46 to 51 on March 11 at $14. Can do better.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Gave ground after racing outside the leader during the early and middle stages.

form.formComment: Surrendered the lead and finished 4th (20m Fr1) over 2180m at Stawell beaten 25 m by Kamaran (2:51.00) in No NR on April 3 at $126.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Surrendered the lead and finished 4th (20m Fr1) over 2180m at Stawell beaten 25 m by Kamaran (2:51.00) in No NR on April 3 at $126.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Surrendered the lead to Boutika approaching the 1200m mark.
Weakened inside the final 600m to be beaten 93m.
Checked racing towards the back straight on the final occasion.

form.formComment: Improved last start with a game effort despite getting well back, when 2nd (Fr5) over 1690m at Maryborough, at the bell was 4th-6.9 beaten a head by Ai Sedhai (2:05.50) in NR 42 to 47 on March 30 at $10. Among the chances again.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Broke in the score up and out of position at the start.

form.formComment: Racing consistently. Last start by a neck (Fr1) at Cranbourne (2:40.70) beating Ess Kay Hollywood in NR up to 50 on March 29 at $6.50 at the bell was leading 3.6. Big chance again.

formComments.comment: Racing consistently. Last start by a neck (Fr1) at Cranbourne (2:40.70) beating Ess Kay Hollywood in NR up to 50 on March 29 at $6.50 at the bell was leading 3.6. Big chance again.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Hung in and contacted marker pegs approaching the entrance to the sprint lane.
Broke gait clear of interference approaching the first turn.

form.formComment: Last start failed to finish when she ran at Stawell on April 3 over 2180m. Two runs back 8th (FT Fr6) over 2190m at Mt Gambier beaten 21 m by Lady Suspicious (2:57.80) in NR up to 59 on March 14 at $8. Prepared to overlook until her racing manners improve.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Broke gait free of interference as the field raced through the first turn.
